debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
ω : WignerSpace n
⊢ (if h : i = j then @ω ⟨(i, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n i⟩
    else
      if h : i < j then @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n i j ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n i j (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n i j ⋯ ⋯)⟩) =
    if h : j = i then @ω ⟨(j, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n j⟩
    else
      if h : j < i then @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n j i ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n j i (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n j i ⋯ ⋯)⟩

proof:
by_cases h_eq : i = j
  · simp [h_eq]
  · by_cases h_lt : i < j
    · have h_not_eq : j ≠ i := fun h => h_eq h.symm
      have h_not_lt : ¬(j < i) := fun h => (lt_asymm h_lt) h
      simp [h_eq, h_lt, h_not_eq, h_not_lt]
    · have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt h_lt) (fun h => h_eq h.symm)
      have h_not_eq' : j ≠ i := fun h => h_eq h.symm
      have h_eq' : i = j → False := fun h => h_eq h
      simp [h_eq, h_lt, h_not_eq', h_gt, Ne.symm h_eq]

by_cases hij : i = j

  · by_cases hlt : i < j
    · have hne : j ≠ i := fun h => hij h.symm

      simp [hij, hlt, hne, hnlt]
    · have hne : j ≠ i := fun h => hij h.symm
      have hgt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hlt) hne
      have hnlt2 : ¬(i < j) := fun h => (lt_asymm hgt h)
      simp [hij, hlt, hne.symm, hgt, hnlt2]
